mnemonics: P.U.T.S. - Performance, Utilization, Throughput, Scheduling criteria
keyPoints: CPU Utilization: Keep the CPU as busy as possible
Throughput: Maximize the number of processes completed per time unit
Turnaround Time: Minimize the time from submission to completion
commonMistakes: Assuming higher CPU utilization always means better performance
Focusing only on one criterion instead of balancing multiple
